aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Quality Heating and Air, but improvements in structured data and conversational content can significantly boost their visibility and trustworthiness.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but the Q&A section could use more engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is not actively managed.
Lack of regular posts to highlight promotions or updates.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed business hours and service area information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on energy efficiency, HVAC trends, and local climate considerations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI model citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating conversational content, and enhancing GBP engagement to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Quality Heating and Air as a top HVAC authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer they wait, the more market share they lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Quality Heating and Air
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
